name: Salty Horizon Exclusive Scuba Diving
description: Private, personalized PADI scuba diving in Tamarindo, Costa Rica, with instructors Camille Segonne (PADI OWSI, MSDT) and Julien Escales (PADI OWSI). Trilingual: English, French, Spanish. Offers Discover Scuba Diving, fun dives at the Catalina Islands and Bat Islands, PADI Open Water and Advanced Open Water certification courses, private snorkeling, and private boat charters.
